comments.author: @RealLifeFilesDoc
comments.text: Beyond the surface aesthetics, the reality of a massive gender imbalance rewrites the entire social fabric of a country. Do you think a society can economically recover from such a severe demographic drop in just one generation?

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: An incredibly sharp analysis! Demographic shifts of that scale definitely shake the foundations of any society. Personally, history shows it takes generations to find a new equilibrium, if at all. Do you think technological automation could fill that economic gap, or is the human/social cost simply irreplaceable?

comments.author: @GlobalRealLifeDocumentary
comments.text: Russia is so vast that it spans 11 time zones, countless cultures, and some of the most extreme landscapes on Earth. 🇷🇺 After watching this documentary, what surprised you the most about Russia that you never knew before?

replies.author: @reallifeincountries
replies.text: Spot on! The 11 time zones always blow people's minds. For me, the extreme contrast in lifestyles across those regions is the biggest shocker. What about you—which of those cultures or landscapes did you find most fascinating while making or researching this?
